transition.label: new_demand?

c_req = 0, build_uav_service_request(), service_request_pending = false, sla_warning_report_sent = false, sla_violation_report_sent = false, violation_report_sent = false, service_reconfigure_sent = false, service_terminate_sent = false
gSlaViolation()
sla_violation?
c_sla_violation = 0, note_sla_violation_event(), sla_violation_report_sent = false, violation_report_sent = false, service_reconfigure_sent = false, service_terminate_sent = false
gSlaViolation()
sla_violation?
c_sla_violation = 0, note_sla_violation_event(), sla_violation_report_sent = false, violation_report_sent = false, service_reconfigure_sent = false, service_terminate_sent = false
!gSlaWarning() && !gSlaViolation()
service_kpi_update?
sla_warning_report_sent = false, sla_violation_report_sent = false, violation_report_sent = false, service_reconfigure_sent = false, service_terminate_sent = false
admissionClass = ADM_ACCEPTED, degraded_allowed = false, degradedReason = DEG_NONE
admissionClass = ADM_DEGRADED, degraded_allowed = true, degradedReason = DEG_COMM_LIMITED
admissionClass = ADM_REJECTED, degraded_allowed = false, degradedReason = DEG_RESOURCE_LIMITED
kpi_t >= D_update
service_kpi_update!

detectionFreshnessClass = DET_FRESH, updatePeriodClass = UPD_OK, falseAlarmClass = FA_OK, missedDetectionClass = MISS_OK, pdClass = PD_OK, accuracyClass = OK, coverageClass = OK, slaClass = SLA_OK, kpi_t = 0
admissionClass == ADM_ACCEPTED || admissionClass == ADM_DEGRADED || admissionClass == ADM_REJECTED
sla_violation_report_sent || violation_report_sent || service_reconfigure_sent || service_terminate_sent || admissionClass == ADM_REJECTED

query.comment: No global deadlock in baseline service-layer composition.
SLA warning is reported or escalated within D_sla_warn.
SLA violation is handled within D_sla_violation.
Expired freshness is handled within D_fresh_report.
Update-period violation is handled within D_update_report.
Critical false alarm is handled within D_fa_report.
Critical missed detection is handled within D_miss_report.
Safety-critical violation is handled within D_safety.
Discrete detection KPI classes are not mutually inconsistent.
Safety-critical degraded admission is allowed only by the contract.
AcceptedDegraded state is reachable under SDN degraded decision.
Rejected state is reachable under SDN reject decision.
